title: L18 Simple Campfire
description: Don't you think that existing campfire recipe is a bit excessive? Really, why do we need a crafting table to make it? However, now it will be much simpler!
body: Simple campfire – datapack, extremely simple in its idea, it replaces existing campfire recipes with shapeless ones that use slightly less materials, so that a campfire can be crafted without the use of a crafting table.
